Header files for CMSIS and build script for STM32F7xx peripheral library.

## Folders
- **[CMSIS](CMSIS/README.md)**: Header files for CMSIS Cortex-M and SC cores, peripheral access, DSP functions, and core instructions.

## Files
- **[wscript](wscript.md)**: Build script for configuring and compiling STM32F7xx standard peripheral library.
